awards.label: Most Efficient
awards.description: Fewest total tokens among clean runs at or above the 60 quality floor.

awards.label: Noisiest
awards.description: Most total tokens consumed among clean headline runs.

awards.label: Underdog
awards.description: Best overall quality per billion parameters among runs with known size metadata.

awards.label: Fatcat
awards.description: Worst overall quality per billion parameters among runs with known size metadata.

awards.label: All-Rounder
awards.description: Best harmonic mean across the six meta-category quality scores.

awards.label: Specialist
awards.description: Biggest gap between best and worst category quality.

awards.label: Nitpicker
awards.description: Highest weighted total of rare rubric signals passed, using inverse signal prevalence across clean runs.
